expectations.evidence: No sub-skill file is loaded or referenced.

expectations.text: Searches by error type (NullPointerException), class (UserService), and method (getProfile)
expectations.evidence: Recommends JQL 'text ~ "NullPointerException UserService.getProfile"' which searches by error type, class, and method together.
JQL includes 'project = BACKEND' in the recommended search query.

expectations.text: Checks for resolved similar issues (regression detection)
expectations.evidence: Does not explicitly search for resolved/closed similar issues for regression detection. Only suggests searching in the Jira UI.

expectations.text: If creating new, uses structured bug format with Component, Error, Steps, Expected/Actual
expectations.evidence: Bug ticket description includes Component (UserService/backend), Error (NPE), Steps to Reproduce (create user with no avatar, call getProfile), and Expected/Actual behavior sections.
